evaluators.name: Stress Management Session Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a single 60-minute stress-management session in the next 7 days, 6–9 PM, with the highest-rated qualifying coach under $150.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Career-Change Package Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the cheapest qualifying 4-session career-change package under $400 to their cart.

evaluators.name: Productivity Sprint Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a 'Productivity Sprint' reading list and added three qualifying productivity articles (4+ min read, last 6 months).

evaluators.name: Self-Discipline Challenge Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user joined a 14-day self-discipline challenge starting within the next 14 days with daily email reminders at 08:00 and SMS off.

evaluators.name: Life Balance Assessment Completion Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed an active life-balance assessment with 10–30 questions and saved the result to their dashboard.

evaluators.name: Relationship Coach Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user contacted a qualifying relationship coach (free consultation, rating ≥4.5, ≥10 reviews) with morning preference and a two-sentence message mentioning communication.

evaluators.name: Working Parents Time-Management Resources Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user bookmarked two qualifying time-management blog posts for working parents and saved one qualifying worksheet (≤10 pages) for working parents.

evaluators.name: March Focus Custom Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a 'March Focus' custom plan with exactly two distinct individual sessions (≤$120 each) and one group workshop (≤$80), total cost ≤$300, preferably on productivity/focus.
